classification_rationale: Exploit combines basic swap actions (flashloan + USDC/USDT swaps to move Curve 3pool price) with a share-asset-pricing mechanism vulnerability: Harvest vault calculates share value from the live Curve LP price, so the attacker buys vault shares cheaply when the manipulated pool undervalues the underlying, then exits after restoring the price. The share-asset-pricing invariant is directly exploited; basic swap actions provide the price distortion.
